summary.en: Chat with Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Together, Groq, OpenRouter, or your own custom endpoint.
Watch model replies appear token-by-token as they are generated.
Every chat is saved locally and reachable from the side drawer.
Replies are rendered with rich markdown including headings, lists, and code.
Stop a streaming reply at any point with a single tap.
Send images alongside your prompt to vision-capable models.
Group related conversations under a shared workspace with its own system prompt.
Dictate your prompts using on-device speech recognition.
Copy any code block from a reply with one tap.
Find any past conversation by title from the drawer search bar.
See how many tokens each reply consumed at a glance.
Scroll up to read older messages without being yanked back; jump to the latest with one tap.
Give any conversation a custom title from the drawer.
Pick light, dark, or follow your system theme.

title.en: Edit and resend a user message

summary.en: Tweak any prompt you sent and regenerate the reply.
Each reply shows which model produced it.
Keep important chats at the top of the drawer.
Conversations are grouped by Today, Yesterday, This Week, and Older.

title.en: Render attached images in user bubbles

summary.en: Images you sent appear inline in the chat history.
Re-run a failed request without retyping your prompt.
Images stay attached to your messages even after you leave the conversation.
Send with Cmd-Return, start a new chat with Cmd-N, and search with Cmd-K.
Save facts about yourself once and have every model use them.
See an estimated dollar cost on every reply.
Copy an entire chat to your clipboard as clean markdown.
Save reusable prompts and recall them by typing a slash command.
Reopening a chat brings back the model it was using.
Select multiple conversations to delete or pin them all at once.
See how many chats live in each project before you switch.
Drop an image straight onto the composer on desktop to attach it.
Re-run any reply through a different model from the message menu.
Type /help in the composer to see every slash command and shortcut.
Half-typed messages are kept per conversation so you can pick up where you left off.
Clone a chat to branch off without disturbing the original.
Search inside a long chat to jump to any message.
See when the model is working and how long it has been thinking.
Filter the model list by name or provider as you type.
Override the system prompt for one specific chat.
Tap a suggested follow-up question after each reply to keep the conversation going.
Download a single JSON file with every conversation, project, and setting.
Restore a previous export to bring all your chats back.
Rate any reply to keep track of what worked.
Press the up arrow in the composer to step back through your previous prompts.
Tap any bubble to reveal when it was sent.

title.en: Favorite a model from the picker

summary.en: Star the models you use most and they jump to the top of the list.
Pick from a library of ready-made system prompts or save your own.
Tag conversations and filter the drawer by one or more tags.
Resize chat text to whatever is comfortable to read.

title.en: Fork chat from a specific message

summary.en: Branch a new conversation from any earlier message in the chat.
